evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Design, build and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines that deliver reliable, high-quality data
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality and reliability are core messaging despite delivery focus; rigour framing.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Low: Internal analytics without explicit financial/regulatory/compliance context.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, build and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines; business-ready datasets
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established infrastructure with multiple pipeline and dataset responsibilities suggests mid-stage.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines; Optimizing data models, SQL queries, and pipeline performance; Contributing to data platform improvements
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Mix of specific responsibilities and generic 'collaborating with BI developers' language suggests recruiter authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: business-ready datasets for reporting and dashboards; collaborating with BI Developers
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data platform focus indicates internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Support-oriented language indicates execution focus despite technical responsibilities.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or infrastructure expectations.
evidence.testing_framing: deliver reliable, high-quality data; data platform improvements
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality framed as responsibility but not explicitly testing ownership.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: reliable, high-quality data; data platform improvements
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: Reliability and quality are concerns but secondary to delivery.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build and maintain; Optimizing; Contributing to improvements
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Maintenance and improvement focus suggests fix_scale.
